mnemonics: Most Numerical Gods Are Extremely Rarely Involved
keyPoints: If A implies B, then it is not the case that A and not B
If A and B, then A implies B
If A implies B and B, then A implies B (Modus Ponens)
If A implies B and not B, then not A (Modus Tollens)
If A and B, then A implies B (Hypothetical Syllogism)
If A implies B and A, then B (Affirming the Consequent)
